title: Fix for rpm.bats test issue
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

A patch for the problem that we've seen in recent tests has hopefully been put into the Fedora Registry but have not yet made it to dockerhub.  Changing the location of the image should hopefully fix this issue and will also hopefully make this test more resilient in the future.

With luck, will fix issuse in #299 and #302
